# Startup Domain Search

> Free AI-powered domain name generator, scorer, and availability checker for startups.
> URL: https://domainsearcher.app

## What it does

Given a description of your startup idea, it:
1. Generates 60 domain name candidates using AI (Groq/OpenAI/Anthropic)
2. Checks availability via two-stage verification: RDAP registry lookup + DNS-over-HTTPS (Cloudflare) double-check
3. Scores each name on six dimensions: Length (LEN), Pronounceability (PRO), Memorability (MEM), Brandability (BRD), Zone availability (ZON), and AI Fit (FIT)
4. Lets you favorite (★) and super-favorite (★★) top picks
5. Generates TLD-aware word associations for each favorited domain
6. Saves named favorite sets (snapshots) you can restore later
7. Exports all data as JSON backup

## Usage

Open https://domainsearcher.app in a browser. Uses Groq (free tier) by default — no key required. Optionally set your own API key for OpenAI or Anthropic in the Settings panel.

## TLD zones

Three configurable zone selectors, each with defaults + custom TLD support:
- **Search zones** (generate candidates): .ai, .com, .io, .app, .dev, .co, .email, .to, .direct
- **Check zones** (quick check): .com, .io, .ai, .app, .co
- **Compare zones** (ZON scoring): .com, .io, .co, .app, .dev

Users can add any custom TLD to any selector.

## Domain availability checking (no auth required)

Two-stage verification for every domain:

1. **RDAP** (rdap.org) — registry lookup:
   - HTTP 200 → taken
   - HTTP 404 → not conclusive, proceed to step 2
2. **DNS-over-HTTPS** (Cloudflare) — A-record lookup:
   - NXDOMAIN (Status 3) → available
   - Has A/CNAME/NS records → taken

AI agents can call rdap.org directly to check individual domains — no API key or authentication required:
- Available: GET https://rdap.org/domain/{domain} returns HTTP 404
- Taken: returns HTTP 200

## Quick Check + Synonyms

Type any domain stem (e.g. "nexus") to:
- Get 6 AI-generated synonyms instantly
- Check all synonyms across selected check zones simultaneously

## Word associations

Each favorited domain gets 5 TLD-aware word associations generated by AI. Associations reflect both the domain stem and the TLD meaning (e.g. .ai → artificial intelligence, .io → developer tool). Custom association prompts are supported.

## Scoring system

Each domain name is scored on six dimensions (0–10 each), combined into a weighted TOTAL:
- **LEN**: Length score — 5 chars = 10, shorter/longer scores drop off
- **PRO**: Pronounceability — based on syllable count and consonant cluster analysis
- **MEM**: Memorability — penalizes generic suffixes (-er, -or), rewards distinctive endings
- **BRD**: Brandability — rewards invented/coined words, penalizes generic compounds
- **ZON**: Zone score — fraction of selected comparison TLDs that are available
- **FIT**: AI-scored relevance to your app idea description (requires context input)

PRO, MEM, BRD, and FIT are AI-scored in a single batch call when context is provided; otherwise local heuristics are used as fallback. Weights for each dimension are adjustable by the user.

## Favorites and export

- **Favorite (★)**: mark any domain as a favorite
- **Super favorite (★★)**: double-star your top picks — displayed first with distinct highlighting
- **Saved favorite sets**: save current favorites as a named snapshot, restore any set later
- **JSON export**: download all domains, scores, zones, associations, and saved sets as a single backup file
